---
title: BRCA1-mutated MB tumours in public datasets
date: 2023-10-19
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

To search public datasets for BRCA1-mutated MB tumours.


## Files and directories

### Code

None

### Output

All output is contained in this file.


## Results

### ICGC

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
  total["all donors (24289)"] -->|primary site: brain| brain["brain only (2504)"]
  brain -->|"project: PBCA-US, PBCA-DE, PEME-CA"| pediatric["pediatric brain (1315)"]
  pediatric -->|"gene: BRCA1"| brca1["BRCA1-mutated (42)"]
```

The search was done on the [ICGC Data Portal](https://dcc.icgc.org/). However, the projects include multiple pediatric brain cancer types, not just medulloblastoma, and no information could be found to confirm which of the 42 BRCA1-mutated cancers are medulloblastoma.

### KidsFirst
